# FleetDecks

> White-label car rental operations software. One dashboard for bookings, fleet operations, WhatsApp leads, deposits, and customer handoffs — built for lean rental teams.

## About

FleetDecks is a white-label SaaS operating system for car rental operators. It replaces scattered WhatsApp chats, phone calls, and spreadsheets with a single branded dashboard for running daily rental operations.

## Key capabilities

- AI booking assistant: captures and qualifies leads from WhatsApp, app, and web, and hands hot enquiries to the team.
- One fleet command desk: tracks booking status, vehicle readiness, handovers, returns, deposits, and upcoming trips from a single dashboard.
- White-label by design: launches with the operator's own brand, customer touchpoints, and workflows.
- Built for lean teams: handles high WhatsApp volume, document checks, security deposits, and city-to-city demand.

## Why operators switch

- One desk instead of five disconnected tools.
- Built for high WhatsApp enquiry volume.
- Deposits and documents tracked against every trip.
- No enterprise bloat — only the workflows a rental desk runs daily.
- Live in days, not months.
